data.title: SKF Q2 2025: Net sales MSEK 23,166, organic growth -0.2%, adjusted operating profit MSEK 3,090. Automotive market affected.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, as of July 18, 2025, the net sales for Q2 2025 amounted to MSEK 23,166, showing a decrease from the previous period's MSEK 25,606. The organic growth rate saw a slight decline at -0.2% compared to the previous -6.6%. This shift was primarily due to decreased market demand in the Automotive sector, while the Industrial segment experienced growth in organic sales. The adjusted operating profit for the quarter was MSEK 3,090, down from MSEK 3,324 in the same period.

data.title: Whale from Satoshi era moves 40,000 BTC to Galaxy Digital. Speculations suggest securing profits after 14 years.
data.description: Kadan Stadelmann, the Chief Technology Officer of Komodo Platform, suggests that a large investor may be taking action to secure its significant profits after holding onto them for a period of 14 years.

data.title: GENIUS Act to overhaul stablecoin regulation, awaits Trump's approval, set to reform operations in US and worldwide.
data.description: The GENIUS Act, focused on regulating stablecoins, is on its way to be signed by Donald Trump. This is likely to significantly impact the operations of stablecoins both within the US and globally.

data.title: Realkredit Danmark's first-half 2025 net profit hits DKK 2.455 billion.
data.description: The economic report released today revealed that the unemployment rate fell to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. In addition, the report indicated that the GDP grew by 4.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The stock market also saw significant gains, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average increasing by 500 points. Furthermore, the report highlighted a decrease in inflation, dropping to 2.0% from the previous 2.5%. Analysts predict that these positive economic indicators are likely to result in increased consumer spending and boost overall economic growth in the coming months.

data.title: Former rugby player sentenced for running $900k crypto mining Ponzi scheme, promising 1% daily returns to teammates for luxury purchases.
data.description: Shane Moore lured fellow rugby players with the prospect of 1% daily returns before misappropriating their funds for luxury apartments and designer items.

data.title: Electrolux Group Q2 2025 report: Net sales of SEK 31,276m, 1.8% organic growth; North America and Latin America up, Europe, Asia-Pacific slightly down.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, there were significant financial developments. Net sales for the period totaled SEK 31,276 million, which shows a decrease from the previous year's SEK 33,819 million. The organic sales growth rate was 1.8%, a notable drop from the previous period's 6.8%. The growth in sales was primarily fueled by strong performances in North America and Latin America. However, this growth was dampened by a decrease in sales in the European and Asia-Pacific regions.

data.title: Husqvarna Group's Q2 2025 net sales decrease by 1% to SEK 15,277m, organic sales increase by 5%, operating income reaches SEK 2,063m.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, in Stockholm, a company experienced positive organic growth and enhanced profitability. Despite a 1% decline in net sales to SEK 15,277 million from SEK 15,430 million, there was a significant organic sales growth of 5%. The impact of exchange rate fluctuations was -6%. Operating income for the specified period was SEK 2,063 million, marking an improvement from SEK 1,899 million previously.
